code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 11 or b == 12 or b == 13
end

fn normalize(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut result = " "
  mut i = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_token
        result = "#{result} "
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      in_token = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_token
    result = "#{result} "
  end
  result
end

fn find_substring(_ haystack: String, _ needle: String, _ from: Int) -> Int
  let hlen = string.len(haystack)
  let nlen = string.len(needle)
  mut i = from
  mut found = -1
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if i + nlen > hlen
      done = true
    else
      let suffix = string.substring(haystack, i, hlen)
      if string.starts_with(suffix, needle)
        found = i
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
  end
  found
end

fn count_token(_ haystack: String, _ needle: String) -> Int
  let nlen = string.len(needle)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    let pos = find_substring(haystack, needle, i)
    if pos < 0
      done = true
    else
      count = count + 1
      i = pos + nlen - 1
    end
  end
  count
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let padded = normalize(input)
let plen = string.len(padded)

mut best_token = ""
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 1
while i < plen
  mut j = i
  mut scanning = true
  while scanning
    if j >= plen
      scanning = false
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(padded, j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32
        scanning = false
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    end
  end
  if j > i
    let tok = string.substring(padded, i, j)
    let needle = " #{tok} "
    let first_pos = find_substring(padded, needle, 0)
    if first_pos == i - 1
      let cnt = count_token(padded, needle)
      if cnt > best_count
        best_count = cnt
        best_token = tok
      end
    end
  end
  i = j + 1
end

println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
